name: Advent Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200°C.
2. Mix all ingredients together, except for the flour.
3. Add the flour slowly until the mixture is soft and can be rolled out.
4. Roll out on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
5. Cut into decorative shapes using cookie cutters, a sharp knife, or the rim of a glass.
6. Place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for about 8 minutes until set but still soft.
8. Cool on a rack before packing into crocks or jars.
The Pennsylvania Dutch settlers made these cookies at Thanksgiving and stored them in a stoneware crock until Christmas. They can be used as a substitute for graham crackers in a pie crust.
